title: Atoz MyBaby Isla Baby Doll Layette Set with Striped Outfit, Teddy Bear and Accessories, Pink & Purple
features: COMPLETE SET: Includes a soft-bodied baby doll with striped romper and matching hat, plush teddy bear companion, feeding bottle, and baby care accessories
COLOUR OPTIONS: Available in 4 charming colour combinations - pink with white stripes or purple with white stripes for varied play options - You will recieve 1 set only
INTERACTIVE PLAY: Perfect for nurturing play with realistic feeding bottle and baby care accessories in a heart-shaped tray
QUALITY DESIGN: Doll features detailed facial features, movable arms and legs, and comfortable fabric clothing that's easy for little hands to manage
GIFT-READY PACKAGING: Comes in an attractive pink display box with cute animal graphics, making it an ideal present for young children
description: Product Description Introduce your little one to the joys of nurturing with this delightful MyBaby Isla Baby Doll Layette Set. Available in charming pink and purple colour variations, each set comes complete with an adorable baby doll dressed in a cosy striped romper and matching cap. The outfit features an endearing bear design, perfect for imaginative play. The comprehensive set includes a soft plush teddy bear companion, a feeding bottle, and a pink utensil set, allowing children to act out daily caregiving routines. The doll's size is perfect for little hands to hold and carry, while the included accessories encourage role-play and help develop empathy and social skills. The striped pattern and pastel colours create a sweet, nursery-inspired aesthetic that appeals to young children. This layette set makes a wonderful gift for aspiring young carers and provides hours of engaging pretend play opportunities. Safety Warning Warning : Not Suitable for children under 36 months - Choking Hazard - Small Parts
